claim_boundary: This confirmation tests the already locked corrected strict-v2 pipeline on new seed-specific bridge and diagnostic partitions. It is a fresh confirmation of the implementation, not evidence of 25 independent deployment domains: jobs on a shared dataset remain statistically clustered. Results do not imply clinical safety, protect unregistered side channels, or cover later target-population drift.
